category_sources: Official GitHub README says innotop is a top clone for MySQL with monitoring features.
source_facts.description says innotop is a top clone for MySQL.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and source_facts.name use innotop.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README notes the manual is embedded in Perl POD and available through perldoc and man; README is the best official web documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/innotop/innotop; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes terminal monitoring features and POD/man manual availability.
source_facts.executables lists innotop as a CLI executable.
